---
number-sections: false
---

# Practice 5: Information, Entropy, and Divergence {#ch-practice-05 .unnumbered}

**Theory connection:** [Volume I, Chapter 5](../chapters/05-information-entropy.qmd)

Use this chapter as the practical companion to the corresponding theory chapter.
Recovered activities are linked where a strong match exists; other sections are
explicit development scaffolds for the next writing cycle.

## Shannon Entropy {#sec-pr-05-shannon-entropy}

Recovered starting point: [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Properties of Shannon Entropy {#sec-pr-05-properties-of-shannon-entropy}

Recovered starting point: [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Entropy in Thermodynamics? {#sec-pr-05-entropy-in-thermodynamics}

Recovered starting point: [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Applications {#sec-pr-05-applications}

::: {.callout-note title="Practice development scaffold"}
Create an activity that makes **Applications** observable through a calculation,
small implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or written interpretation.
Include a reproducible input, a checkable result, and one reflection question.
::: 

## Limits and Other Measures {#sec-pr-05-limits-and-other-measures}

::: {.callout-note title="Practice development scaffold"}
Create an activity that makes **Limits and Other Measures** observable through a calculation,
small implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or written interpretation.
Include a reproducible input, a checkable result, and one reflection question.
::: 

### Relative Entropy {#sec-pr-05-relative-entropy}

Recovered starting point: [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Jensen-Shannon Divergence {#sec-pr-05-jensen-shannon-divergence}

Recovered starting point: [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## IDF and KL Divergence {#sec-pr-05-idf-and-kl-divergence}

Recovered starting point: [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Least Information Theory (LIT) {#sec-pr-05-least-information-theory-lit}

Recovered starting point: [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.
